/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/neurotrees_copy.dir/src/driver/neurotrees_copy.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.cell.dir/src/cell/append_tree.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.cell.dir/src/cell/cell_attributes.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.cell.dir/src/cell/cell_index.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/append_edge_map.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/append_edge_map_selection.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/append_rank_attr_map.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/append_rank_edge_map.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/append_rank_edge_map_selection.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/append_rank_tree_map.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/append_tree_map.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/attr_map.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/attr_val.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/range_sample.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/serialize_cell_attributes.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/serialize_edge.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/serialize_tree.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.data.dir/src/data/tokenize.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/attr_kind_datatype.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/copy_h5types.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/create_file_toplevel.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/create_group.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/dataset_num_elements.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/dataset_type.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/exists_dataset.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/exists_group.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/exists_h5types.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/file_access.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/group_contents.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/num_projection_blocks.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/path_names.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/read_cell_index_ptr.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/read_link_names.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/read_projection_dataset_selection.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.hdf5.dir/src/hdf5/read_projection_datasets.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.io.dir/src/io/read_layer_swc.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.io.dir/src/io/read_syn_projection.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.io.dir/src/io/read_txt_projection.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.mpi.dir/src/mpi/mpe_seq.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.mpi.dir/src/mpi/node_rank_map.cc.o CMakeFiles/neuroh5.mpi.dir/src/mpi/rank_range.cc.o -o bin/neurotrees_copy  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libhdf5.320.1.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/open-mpi/5.0.9/lib/libmpi.dylib
